steps.title: Read the title and name together
steps.content: The phrase US economist directly introduces the proper name Arthur Laffer. Because the name identifies which economist is meant, no punctuation is needed between the job title and the name.

steps.title: Remove unnecessary punctuation
steps.content: Choice B inserts an unwarranted dash between the title and name. Choice C uses a colon even though the name is not a list or explanation. Choice D wrongly sets off the identifying name with a comma. The answer is A.
